title: Duplicate customer data issue in Router Agent
symptom: The Router Agent saves duplicate entries for customer data, leading to multiple rows with incomplete information in Airtable.
applies_when: Using Router Agent to save customer data
not_this_if: All required fields are always filled before saving
root_cause: The AI agent saves customer data without checking if all required fields (name, number, interest) are present. This can lead to incomplete records being saved multiple times, resulting in duplicates.
fix_steps: Modify the prompt to include a condition: 'Only save customer data if all required fields (name, number, interest) are present.'
Add a check in the workflow to detect existing records before saving new data.
agent_instruction: Update the prompt and add a duplicate check in the workflow for customer data.
